data.productDescription: Corporate card, expense management, bill pay, procurement, travel, and accounting automation for finance teams.
data.builtFor: Finance teams at growing companies that need spend controls and faster close.
data.idealCustomer: CFOs, VP Finance, Controllers, and finance operations leaders at 100-5000 employee companies.
data.jobTitles: CFO, VP Finance, Controller, Head of Finance, Accounting Manager
data.triggers: Rapid hiring, manual expenses, slow month-end close, need tighter spend controls.
data.currentAlternative: Brex, Navan, Airbase, BILL, Expensify, legacy corporate cards, spreadsheets.
data.coreFeatures: Corporate cards, expenses, bill pay, reimbursements, procurement, accounting integrations, automation.
data.firstValueMoment: Cards issued and spend policies/accounting sync visible to finance.
data.activationEvent: Connect accounting, configure approvals, issue cards.
data.retentionDrivers: Spend visibility, faster close, automated controls, accounting sync.
data.pricingTiers: Use sourced Ramp pricing only; mark undisclosed where unavailable.
data.whyCustomersChooseYou: Consolidated controls, automation, savings, faster close.
data.lossReasons: Existing competitor relationship, travel depth, procurement fit, international support.
data.competitorAdvantages: Brex brand; Navan travel; Airbase procurement/AP; BILL ecosystem; Expensify simplicity.
data.primaryGoal90Days: Increase qualified demos from finance leaders with efficient CAC.
data.commonObjections: Switching cost, implementation time, accounting integration confidence, controls migration.
data.keyPromises: Control spend, automate busywork, close books faster, save money.
data.brandPositioning: Ramp helps finance teams control spend and automate finance operations.
data.whatsWorking: High-intent search and LinkedIn ABM to finance leaders.
data.whatsNotWorking: Generic finance automation messaging without proof.
